fields.label: Page Builder
fields.name: page_builder
fields.instructions: Use the modules below to craft your own custom page layouts. Add, reorder, and customise to make your page exactly how you want.

sub_fields.label: Banner Image
sub_fields.name: banner_image
sub_fields.instructions:
Dimensions: 1920 x 1280px
If a video file is added, this will be used as the default image if needed

sub_fields.label: Banner Video
sub_fields.name: banner_video
sub_fields.instructions: Dimensions: 1920 x 1080px or 1280 x 720px - File size depending

sub_fields.label: Show Image on the Left?
sub_fields.name: image_position
sub_fields.instructions: By default the image appears on the right

sub_fields.label: Posts Per Page
sub_fields.name: posts_per_page
sub_fields.instructions: Leave blank to show all. Default: 9

sub_fields.label: Show Contact Details?
sub_fields.name: show_details
sub_fields.instructions: Display contact details alongside the form

sub_fields.label: Video File
sub_fields.name: video_file
sub_fields.instructions: Dimensions: 1920 x 1080px or 1280 x 720px - File size depending

sub_fields.label: Content Table
sub_fields.name: content_table
sub_fields.instructions: Please enter the table short code

sub_fields.label: Image One
sub_fields.name: image_one
sub_fields.instructions: Please enter the table short code

sub_fields.label: Image Two
sub_fields.name: image_two
sub_fields.instructions: Please enter the table short code

sub_fields.label: Text Column One
sub_fields.name: text_column_one
sub_fields.instructions: Please enter the table short code

sub_fields.label: Text Column Two
sub_fields.name: text_column_two
sub_fields.instructions: Please enter the table short code

sub_fields.label: Text Column
sub_fields.name: text_column_split
sub_fields.instructions: Please enter the table short code

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image_split
sub_fields.instructions: Please enter the table short code

sub_fields.label: Show Image on the left?
sub_fields.name: show_image_on_the_left
sub_fields.instructions: By default the image will show in the right column
